title: BoltWorldGuard
description: Bolt add-on providing integration support with WorldGuard
body:
[Bolt](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bolt) add-on providing integration support with [WorldGuard](https://dev.bukkit.org/projects/worldguard).

**Features**
- region access type: Allow members of a WorldGuard region to access a protection
- /protectregion command: Automatically lock protectables in a region
- /purgeregion command: Automatically remove protections in a region
- bolt-protections WorldGuard flag: Control which regions players can create protections in

**Configuration**
- To enable and use the region access type, add `region` to the list of sources in your Bolt config!
